org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.query.Columns.Selector

Description
org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.convert
Spring Data Cassandra specific converter infrastructure.
org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.query
Apache Cassandra specific query and update support.

    Methods in org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.query that return Columns.Selector
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Columns.Selector
    Columns.Selector.as(com.datastax.oss.driver.api.core.CqlIdentifier alias)
    Apply the given alias to the current Columns.Selector expression.
    default Columns.Selector
    Columns.Selector.as(String alias)
    Apply the given alias to the current Columns.Selector expression.
    Columns.Selector
    Columns.SelectorBuilder.column()
    Include the column in the selection.
    Columns.Selector
    Columns.SimilarityBuilder.cosine()
    Return the Cosine similarity function for the column in the selection based on the previously defined vector.
    Columns.Selector
    Columns.SimilarityBuilder.dotProduct()
    Return the Dot-Product similarity function for the column in the selection based on the previously defined vector.
    Columns.Selector
    Columns.SimilarityBuilder.euclidean()
    Return the Euclidean similarity function for the column in the selection based on the previously defined vector.
    Columns.Selector
    Columns.SelectorBuilder.ttl()
    Return the time to live for the column in the selection.
    Columns.Selector
    Columns.SimilarityBuilder.using(SimilarityFunction similarityFunction)
    Return a similarity function using SimilarityFunction for the column in the selection based on the previously defined vector.
